# LURA — llms.txt

> LURA is a Bulgarian wellness brand offering Corti-Glow, a science-backed evening mocktail supplement with 7 active ingredients for stress relief, hormonal balance, and beauty from within.

> For comprehensive product details, ingredients, clinical references, FAQ, and pricing, see the full version: https://luralab.eu/llms-full.txt

## About LURA
- Brand: LURA (operated by "ЛЕВЕЛ 8" ЕООД / LEVEL 8 Ltd.)
- EIK: 208697165
- Website: https://luralab.eu
- Language: Bulgarian (bg)
- Category: Health supplements, wellness, adaptogens
- Founded: 2026, Varna, Bulgaria

## Product: Corti-Glow
- Type: Powdered mocktail supplement (sachets)
- Flavor: Wild Strawberry & Lime (Горска Ягода и Лайм)
- Servings: 30 sachets per box
- Key ingredients (7 active): Myo-Inositol (2000mg), Ashwagandha 5% withanolides (300mg), Magnesium Bisglycinate (670mg / 100mg elemental), Prebiotic Inulin from chicory root (2500mg), L-Theanine (200mg), Bromelain 2400 GDU/g (100mg), Vitamin B6 P-5-P (1.4mg)
- Benefits: Lowers cortisol up to 27%, improves sleep, reduces bloating, supports hormonal balance
- Target audience: Women concerned about stress, sleep quality, skin health, and hormonal wellness
- Price range: 49.99-119.99 EUR

## Scientific References
- Ashwagandha cortisol reduction: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/23439798/
- Magnesium and sleep quality: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/23853635/
- Myo-Inositol hormonal support: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28724175/
